product_updates.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
product_updates.content: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

product_updates.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
product_updates.content: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

product_updates.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
product_updates.content: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

product_updates.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
product_updates.content: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

product_updates.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
product_updates.content: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.
